g.text: Go get the big brown bowl.
Lift the top bowls off one at a time.
Slide the bottom bowl out fast.
Scoop small scoops, nice and slow.
Tip the whole crock over at once.
Pour the seeds in a gentle stream.
Shake the jar hard upside down.
Let the dough have a little nap.
Roll neat round buns like Grandma’s.
Squish fun shapes, stars and snails.
Watch and wait by the warm oven.
Watch and wait by the warm oven.
Open the door for a tiny peek.
Wait by the warm oven again.
Have a teatime picnic with Grandma.
Take warm buns to the neighbors.
Line up the batch on the windowsill.
Open the door for a tiny peek.
Wait by the warm oven again.
Taste the wiggly star bun first.
Draw the new buns on the recipe card.
Show the silly buns to the neighbors.
